title: Shattering Winey Venezuelan Lamb Kidney Grill
description: A hearty one-pot Venezuelan dish featuring lamb kidney, with a rich winey sauce and a satisfying crunch from the grilled elements.

ingredients.name: Lamb kidneys
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, sliced into 1/4-inch thick pieces

ingredients.name: Red wine
ingredients.notes: Full-bodied, such as Cabernet Sauvignon or Malbec

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced red onion and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lamb kidney slices and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Add the red wine, salt, and black pepper to the skillet, stirring to deglaze the pan and loosen any browned bits.
Bring the wine to a simmer and cook until reduced by half, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and grated ginger.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, covered, until the lamb is tender, about 10-15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes.
Grill the sliced red onion and lamb kidney over medium heat until charred and slightly caramelized, about 5-7 minutes per side.
Serve the Shattering Winey Venezuelan Lamb Kidney Grill hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
